name: Catalogizer Full QA - Cross-Platform Consistency
description: Cross-platform tests verifying data consistency, feature parity, and unified behavior across API, Web, Android TV, and Android Phone

test_cases.name: Login credentials work across all platforms

steps.name: Login via Web
steps.action: Navigate to login page, enter admin/admin123, click Login

steps.name: Login via Android TV
steps.action: Launch app, configure server, enter admin/admin123

steps.name: Login via Android Phone
steps.action: Launch app, configure server, enter admin/admin123

test_cases.expected_result: Same credentials authenticate on all platforms

test_cases.name: Media count consistent across platforms

steps.name: Check Web dashboard count
steps.action: Navigate to dashboard, read media statistics

steps.name: Check Android TV home
steps.action: Navigate to home screen, check category counts

test_cases.expected_result: All platforms report the same media count

test_cases.name: Search returns same results across platforms
test_cases.expected_result: Search results are identical across all platforms

test_cases.name: Favorites sync across platforms

steps.name: Add favorite via Web
steps.action: Navigate to a movie, click favorite star

test_cases.expected_result: Favorites are synchronized across all platforms

test_cases.name: Collections accessible across platforms
test_cases.expected_result: Collections created on one platform visible on all

test_cases.name: All 11 media types browsable on all platforms

steps.name: List media types via API
steps.expected: Returns 11 types: movie, tv_show, tv_season, tv_episode, music_artist, music_album, song, game, software, book, comic

steps.name: Verify Android TV shows categories
steps.expected: Categories for available content types present

test_cases.expected_result: All 11 media types accessible on every platform

test_cases.name: Playback works on all platforms

steps.name: Play video on Web
steps.action: Navigate to a movie, click Play

steps.name: Play video on Android TV
steps.action: Navigate to same movie, press Play

steps.name: Play audio on Web
steps.action: Navigate to a song, click Play

test_cases.expected_result: Media playback works on all client platforms

test_cases.name: Entity detail shows same metadata on all platforms

steps.name: Check Web entity detail
steps.action: Navigate to same entity detail page

steps.name: Check Android TV detail
steps.action: Navigate to same entity on TV

test_cases.expected_result: Entity metadata is identical across all platforms

test_cases.name: Cyrillic directory names display correctly

steps.name: Browse Cyrillic path via API
steps.action: GET /api/v1/browse with path containing Cyrillic (Музика, Филмови)
steps.expected: Cyrillic characters in response are correct UTF-8

steps.name: Browse on Web
steps.action: Navigate to storage root, browse Cyrillic directories
steps.expected: Cyrillic names render correctly without mojibake

steps.name: Browse on Android TV
steps.action: Browse media browser for Cyrillic category

test_cases.expected_result: Cyrillic content renders correctly on all platforms

test_cases.name: Search with Cyrillic works across platforms

steps.name: Search 'Музика' on Web
steps.action: Type Cyrillic search term in web search

test_cases.expected_result: Cyrillic search returns consistent results across platforms

test_cases.name: Invalid login shows error on all platforms

steps.name: Invalid login on Web
steps.expected: Error message displayed, not a crash

steps.name: Invalid login on Android TV
steps.expected: Error message displayed, stays on login screen

test_cases.expected_result: All platforms show user-friendly error for invalid login

test_cases.name: Non-existent entity shows 404 on all platforms
test_cases.expected_result: All platforms handle missing entities gracefully

test_cases.name: TV channel content matches API data

steps.name: Check Catalogizer Picks channel
steps.action: Navigate to Android TV home, find Catalogizer Picks channel
steps.expected: Channel programs match API movie list

test_cases.expected_result: TV home screen channels reflect current API data

test_cases.name: Deep link from TV channel opens correct content

steps.name: Identify a channel program
steps.action: Note the title of a program in Catalogizer channel on TV home

steps.name: Click program
steps.expected: App opens to correct media detail screen

steps.name: Verify content matches
steps.action: Compare detail screen title with channel program title

test_cases.expected_result: Deep linking from TV channels opens correct content

test_cases.name: Playlist created on Web accessible on API
test_cases.expected_result: Playlists sync between Web and API

test_cases.name: Logout on one platform does not affect others

steps.name: Login on Web and Android TV
Check Android TV
steps.expected: Android TV session still active (independent tokens)

test_cases.expected_result: Sessions are independent per platform

test_cases.name: API rate limiting consistent across access methods

steps.name: Send 6 rapid login attempts via API
Check web login is also rate-limited

test_cases.expected_result: Rate limiting applies consistently

test_cases.name: WebSocket events received on Web client

steps.name: Check Web receives events
steps.action: Watch Web UI for scan progress updates

test_cases.expected_result: API actions trigger real-time updates on Web

test_cases.name: Version info consistent across platforms

steps.name: Check Web about/footer
steps.action: Look for version in Web UI

test_cases.expected_result: All platforms report v2.3.0

test_cases.name: Concurrent platform access does not cause data corruption

steps.name: Login on all platforms simultaneously
steps.action: Open Web, Android TV, and send API request at same time

steps.name: Add different favorites from each
steps.action: Favorite different items from Web and Android TV

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent multi-platform access is safe
